title: Improver dream pass routable via preRoute (opt-in), one-shot fallback retained

tests.cmd: npx vitest run tests/improver-routed-dream.test.ts + improver regression
tests.summary: 15 passed — chooseDreamRunTurn routes only when enabled+url else default one-shot; makeRoutedRunTurn posts to gateway /chat returns {reply}; throws on non-ok; improver-memory-dream + pty-path regression intact

suite.summary: 898 passed; 6 PRE-EXISTING failures; no new regressions

review.summary: OPT-IN (the Improver runs standalone/nightly, can't require a live gateway): default → defaultRunTurn (unchanged); routed only when GARRISON_IMPROVER_ROUTE_VIA_GATEWAY=1 + GARRISON_GATEWAY_URL. Low blast radius.

blockers.cause: external: Codex/ChatGPT workspace out of credits
